item.title: Multistage Pseudo-Spectral Method (Method of Collocations) for the Approximate Solution of an Ordinary Differential Equation of the First Order
item.description:
Published in Discrete and Continuous Models and Applied Computational Science, Vol. 30, No. 2, pp. 127–138, 2022.

Co-authored with K.P. Lovetskiy and D.S. Kulyabov (RUDN University). Supported by the RUDN University Strategic Academic Leadership Program.

item.title: An example conference paper
item.description:
Click the Cite button above to demo the feature to enable visitors to import publication metadata into their reference management software.
Create your slides in Markdown - click the Slides button to check out the example.

Supplementary notes can be added here, including code, math, and images.
